name: State Bank Of Southern Utah
description_short: State Bank of Southern Utah is a locally-owned community bank offering personal and business banking services including checking, savings, loans, and investment products across Southern Utah.
description_long:
State Bank of Southern Utah (SBSU) is a community-focused financial institution serving Southern Utah with a stated commitment to being "Locally Owned, Community Grown." The bank operates multiple branch and ATM locations throughout the region and maintains an active online presence at sbsu.com.

SBSU offers comprehensive banking products for both personal and business customers. On the personal side, they provide checking and savings accounts, CDs and IRAs, personal loans, debit and credit cards, and home financing options including conventional, FHA, and VA mortgages. Their business division offers business checking and savings accounts, business debit and credit cards, business loans, and specialized services like merchant services, check scanners, cash management, and positive pay systems. The bank also provides investment services and financial education resources including online tutorials and a mobile app for children ages 5-17.

SBSU distinguishes itself through community involvement and local decision-making. The website highlights participation in local events (Parade of Homes 2026 attracted 4,000-5,000 daily visitors), scholarship programs for high school students, and recognition in local "Best of Southern Utah" voting. Their promotional products include a high-interest checking account earning 5.00% APY, a cash back checking account offering 5% cash back on debit purchases (capped at $10/month), and competitive mortgage rates (30-year fixed as low as 6.375% APR). The bank emphasizes that local bankers "live and work in your community."

As a regional community bank, SBSU serves customers seeking personalized, local banking relationships rather than national mega-bank services. However, the website provides limited detail about specific loan terms, credit requirements, fees, or comprehensive product comparisons. Customers should contact branch officers directly to understand full terms, eligibility criteria, and how SBSU's rates compare to national competitors. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal checking accounts with promotional high-interest rates (5.00% APY)
Personal savings accounts and cash back checking (5% cash back, max $10/month)
Personal loans and auto loans (as low as 5.49% fixed)
Home loans including 30-year fixed, 15-year fixed, FHA, and VA mortgages
Home equity lines of credit (HELOC, variable as low as 6.75%)
Debit and credit cards for personal and business use
Business loans with contact to business loan officer
Merchant services and business credit cards
Cash management services, check scanners, and positive pay systems
Investment services and financial education resources
Online banking, mobile apps, and fraud/scam information resources
pros: Offers high-interest checking account with 5.00% APY with no mention of minimum balance restrictions on the main marketing materials
5% cash back on debit card purchases for cash back checking account holders (capped at $10/month)
Diverse home loan options including conventional, FHA, and VA mortgages with published rate ranges
Free SBSU Kids App for financial education of children ages 5-17 with focus on earning and money management
Community-focused with local scholarship programs and active participation in regional events
Comprehensive business banking suite including merchant services, cash management, positive pay, and check scanning
Online banking and mobile apps available for account access and management
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted to Southern Utah, unlike national banks with broader accessibility
Website provides rates as of April 2, 2026 with minimal detail on qualification requirements, fees, or APR details beyond basic disclosure
High-interest checking account rates and cash back rewards lack detailed terms, conditions, or potential account minimums on marketing pages
No transparent fee schedule or account comparison tools visible on the website to evaluate true cost of services
Limited information about credit card rewards structures, annual fees, or detailed product comparisons for informed decision-making

contact.address: 377 N Main St, Cedar City, UT 84721

best_for: Southern Utah residents seeking personalized, local banking relationships with community involvement
Business owners requiring comprehensive business banking services including merchant processing and cash management
Homebuyers interested in conventional, FHA, or VA mortgage options with local loan officer guidance
Families wanting to provide financial education to children through the SBSU Kids App and local banking partnerships
diagnosis: State Bank of Southern Utah is best for Southern Utah residents and business owners seeking personalized, community-based banking with local decision-making and involvement in regional events. The main caveat is that this is a regional institution with limited geographic reach, and prospective customers will need to contact branch officers directly to obtain detailed terms, qualification requirements, and fee schedules since the website provides limited transparency on these critical factors.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 377 N Main St, Cedar City, UT 84721
